project_area: creative disciplines (music, visual art, dance, theater, writing, digital media, film, etc.)
demographic_requirements: community-centered projects with a focus on accessibility and inclusivity
eligibility_summary: Supports independent artists and small nonprofit organizations offering impactful, community-centered creative projects in the Lehigh Valley. Grants range from $500 to $2,500 for new or reimagined projects across all creative disciplines.
